tolerances.comment: Δ ≤ tol → EXACT, Δ ≤ 2*tol → CLOSE, Δ > 2*tol → DIFFER (per *_DTA_REVIEW.html TOLERANCES).

convention_note: mada::reitsma reports the second component as logit(FPR) = -logit(spec). webr-dta-validator.js negates fit$coefficients[2] and Psi[1,2] so the comparison is on the engine's logit(spec) convention (lessons.md SROC sign rule).
note: Placeholder — engine itself is shared across the DTA portfolio (rapidmeta-dta-engine-v1.js). Cross-validation against R mada::reitsma was performed on the upstream GeneXpert Ultra fixtures (see r_validation_log_genexpert_ultra_tb.json — 7/7 EXACT for primary tier and 7/7 EXACT for combined tier). A p-tau217-AD-specific validation run is planned for v1.1; click 'Validate pool with R (mada)' on the Methods tab to run a live in-browser validation via WebR.
validator_install_method: webr::install("mada") (R 4.5.x WebR cannot run install.packages() for source packages; webr::install fetches a precompiled WASM binary)
browser: Playwright Chromium via Playwright MCP (COOP/COEP served by serve_coop.py on :8765)
